text:
The market settled correctly — Warriors won by 1 in OT, so Lakers positions closed as losses. The four-hour gap between final whistle and settlement is normal; we wait for official league data confirmation before grading any market, and that can take time depending on how quickly the official feed processes the result.

Overtime games, stat corrections, or other review items can add to that window, but I don't have the specific reason for the delay on this one. If you want to know what caused the four-hour window on this particular market, I can escalate that to our trading ops team — they can pull the settlement log and tell you what held it up.

Novig Support
